pages.text: <?xml version="1.0"?> <gc:Codelist xmlns:gc="http://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/ns/genericode/1.0/"> <gc:Identification> <gc:ShortName Lang="en">AE VAT category codes</gc:ShortName> <gc:Version>D.16B</gc:Version> </gc:Identification> <gc:ColumnSet> <gc:Column Id="id" Use="required"> <gc:ShortName>Identifier</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="name" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Name</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="description" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Description</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Key Id="idKey"> <gc:ColumnRef Ref="id"/> </gc:Key> </gc:ColumnSet> <gc:SimpleCodeList> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>S</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Standard rate</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Code specifying the standard rate.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>E</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Exempt from tax</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Code specifying that taxes are not applicable.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>O</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Services outside scope of tax / Not subject to tax</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Code specifying that taxes are not applicable to the services and/or not subject to VAT</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>AE</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>VAT Reverse Charge</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Code specifying that the standard VAT rate is levied from the invoicee.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>Z</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Zero rated</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Code specifying that the goods and/or services are at a zero rate.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>Ν</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Standard rate additional VAT</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Standard VAT calculated for an additional taxable base when the additional taxable base is not included in the document totals.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> </gc:SimpleCodeList> </gc:Codelist>
